case_title: ALFREDO CASTRO VS. GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, GABINO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TORRES, MARIA INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, ALFREDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, GABINO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TORRES, MARIA INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $2,510.20 PRINCIPAL, $9.39 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,744.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
